ddls:
CREATE TABLE "etfs" (
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the ETF */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Full name of the ETF fund */,
  "emp_a_ca_exposure" REAL /* Exposure to EMP.A-CA (%) */,
  "sector_exposure" REAL /* Sector exposure (%) */,
  "one_year_price_performance" REAL /* 1-year price performance (%) */,
  "one_year_volatility" REAL /* 1-year volatility (%) */,
  "net_expense_ratio" REAL /* Net expense ratio (%) */,
  "number_of_holdings" INTEGER /* Number of holdings in the ETF */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date when the ETF was launched */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the ETF is primarily focused */,
  "esg_score" REAL /* ESG score */,
  "benchmark_index" TEXT /* Benchmark index */,
  "asset_under_management" REAL /* Total assets under management */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the ETF is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Parent sector ID for hierarchical classification */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the sector primarily belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_sectors" (
  "etf_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF-sector mapping */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "exposure_percentage" REAL /* Exposure percentage of the ETF to the sector */,
  "region_exposure" REAL /* Exposure percentage of the ETF to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_sectors_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_sectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "price_performance" REAL /* 1-year price performance (%) */,
  "volatility" REAL /* 1-year volatility (%) */,
  "three_month_price_performance" REAL /* 3-month price performance (%) */,
  "five_year_price_performance" REAL /* 5-year price performance (%) */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield (%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense entry */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date of the expense entry */,
  "net_expense_ratio" REAL /* Net expense ratio (%) */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee (%) */,
  "other_fees" REAL /* Other fees (%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "holding_name" TEXT /* Name of the holding */,
  "holding_weight" REAL /* Weight of the holding in the ETF (%) */,
  "holding_type" TEXT /* Type of the holding (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the holding */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Full name of the ETF fund
Number of holdings in the ETF
Date when the ETF was launched
Region where the ETF is primarily focused
Currency in which the ETF is traded
Parent sector ID for hierarchical classification
Region to which the sector primarily belongs
Unique identifier for each ETF-sector mapping
Exposure percentage of the ETF to the sector
Exposure percentage of the ETF to the region
Unique identifier for each performance metric
Unique identifier for each expense entry
Weight of the holding in the ETF (%)
Type of the holding (e.g., stock, bond)
Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, financial analyst, admin)
Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive)
